heading: Instructions of citizens from American republics; United States Military Academy; restrictions; saving provision
label: 221a Instructions of citizens from American republics; United States Military Academy; restrictions; saving provision
text: After , no person shall have authority to permit citizens of the American Republics to receive instruction at the United States Military Academy under the provisions of . Any person who is receiving instruction at the United States Military Academy on , under authority of , may, in the discretion of the President, be permitted to continue to receive such instruction and, if so permitted, shall thereafter be deemed to be receiving instruction under the provisions of .June 26, 1946June 26, 1946section 221 of this titlesection 221 of this titlesection 347 of title 10
